meta_evaluation_findings.flaw: Compliance checker blind spot — Prompt has no AI disclosure — agent never identifies as AI agent or artificial intelligence. Rule RULE_1_AI_DISCLOSURE passes when it should fail.
meta_evaluation_findings.fix: Add keyword check: prompt must contain "AI agent" or "artificial intelligence" to pass Rule 1 (RULE_1_AI_DISCLOSURE).
